AA.S3.1.note: Live behavior test: first frame received by mock server was {event:'registerPlugin', uuid:'CTX-ABC'}.

AA.S3.2.note: willAppear stores context in CONTEXTS map; willDisappear deletes; _hasContext exposed for testing.

AA.S3.3.note: Live test: touchTap and dialRotate produced only logMessage frames; no setFeedback/setImage/setTitle/openUrl/setState.

AA.S3.4.note: sendFeedback emits {event:'setFeedback', context, payload:{title, artist}} via _safeSend.
